use_cases: Selecting numeric values within a defined range for form inputs
Filtering products or data by price or quantity ranges in e-commerce
Setting thresholds or sensitivity levels in dev-tools interfaces
Adjusting numeric parameters in SaaS configuration panels
ai_summary: A fully interactive range slider component with drag-to-select functionality supporting both mouse and touch inputs. Features dark/light mode toggle and smooth animations via Framer Motion. Ideal for numeric value selection in forms, filters, and settings interfaces across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tool platforms.
